Package i5.cb.api

Interface ICBclient

  • All Superinterfaces:
    java.rmi.Remote
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    CBclient, CBConnection, CBNotificationConnection, LocalCBclient, RemoteCBclient

    public interface ICBclient
extends java.rmi.Remote
    This interface allows CBclient objects to be used via RMI, in order to establish connections to a ConceptBase server through firewalls. ICBclient is implemented by
    • LocalCBclient, the local version
    • RemoteCBclient, the remote version
    • CBclient, that covers both versions

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      CBanswer ask​(java.lang.String sQuery, java.lang.String sQueryFormat, java.lang.String sAnswerRep, java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
      sends a query to the ConceptBase server.
      CBanswer askFrames​(java.lang.String sQuery, java.lang.String sAnswerRep, java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
      sends a query in frame format to the server and returns the answer of the ConceptBase server
      CBanswer askObjNames​(java.lang.String sQuery, java.lang.String sAnswerRep, java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
      sends a query (as objectname) to the server and returns the answer of the server
      java.lang.String asks​(java.lang.String sQuery)
      ask the query to the ConceptBase server
      java.lang.String asks​(java.lang.String sQuery, java.lang.String sFormat)
      ask the query to the ConceptBase server using a given answer format
      CBanswer cancelMe​()
      disconnects from a ConceptBase server.
      java.lang.String cd​(java.lang.String newModule)
      switch the current module to a new module
      java.lang.String connect​(java.lang.String sHost, int iPort, java.lang.String sTool, java.lang.String sUser)
      connects to a ConceptBase server
      java.lang.String disconnect​()
      disconnects from a ConceptBase server
      CBanswer enrollMe​(java.lang.String sHost, int iPort, java.lang.String sTool, java.lang.String sUser)
      connects to a ConceptBase server
      java.lang.String findInstances​(java.lang.String sObjname)
      Calls the builtin query find_instances with the given parameter
      java.lang.String getClientId​()  
      java.lang.String getErrorMessages​()
      Gets the error messages from the server for the previous method.
      java.lang.String getHostName​()  
      java.lang.String getModule​()  
      CBanswer getModulePath​()  
      CBanswer getNotificationMessage​(int iTimeOut)
      gets a notification message from the server
      java.lang.String getObject​(java.lang.String sObjname)
      Calls the builtin query get_object with the given parameter
      int getPort​()  
      java.lang.String getServerId​()  
      int getTimeOut​()  
      java.lang.String getToolName​()  
      java.lang.String getUserName​()  
      CBanswer hypoAsk​(java.lang.String sFrames, java.lang.String sQuery, java.lang.String sQueryFormat, java.lang.String sAnswerRep, java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
      tells the specified frames temporarily to the ConceptBase Server, and evaluate the query on the temporarily object base.
      boolean isConnected​()  
      java.lang.String listModule​(java.lang.String sModule)  
      CBanswer LPIcall​(java.lang.String lpicall)
      Performs an LPI-Call at the server.
      java.lang.String mkdir​(java.lang.String newModule)
      create a new sub-module in the current module
      CBanswer nextMessage​(java.lang.String sType)
      Gets a message from the server
      CBanswer notificationRequest​(java.lang.String sAbout)
      send a request for notification messages of the specified type.
      CBanswer notificationRequest​(java.lang.String sAbout, java.lang.String sTool)
      sends a request for notification messages of the specified type for a given tool.
      java.lang.String pwd​()
      display the current module path as a String like "System-oHome-myMod"
      CBanswer retell​(java.lang.String sUntellFrames, java.lang.String sTellFrames)
      untells specified frames and tells new frames to the server in one transaction
      void setConnected​(boolean connected)
      setter for the connected property.
      CBanswer setModule​(java.lang.String sModule)
      sets the module context of the current client.
      boolean setTimeOut​(int iMilliSecs)
      sets the timeout for the connection
      CBanswer stopServer​()
      Stops the ConceptBase server
      CBanswer tell​(java.lang.String sFrames)
      tells frames to the server.
      CBanswer tellModel​(java.lang.String[] asFiles)
      tells sml-files (text files containing frames) to the server
      java.lang.String tells​(java.lang.String sFrames)
      tell the frames to the ConceptBase server
      CBanswer tellTransactions​(java.lang.String sTransactions)
      tells transactions to the server.
      CBanswer untell​(java.lang.String sFrames)
      untells frames to the server
      java.lang.String untells​(java.lang.String sFrames)
      untell the frames to the ConceptBase server

    • Method Detail

      • enrollMe

        CBanswer enrollMe​(java.lang.String sHost,
                  int iPort,
                  java.lang.String sTool,
                  java.lang.String sUser)
           throws CBException,
                  java.rmi.RemoteException
        connects to a ConceptBase server
        Parameters:
        sHost - hostname of the machine where the server runs
        iPort - port number of server
        sTool - the name of the tool
        sUser - the name of the user
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs when connecting
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • cancelMe

        CBanswer cancelMe​()
           throws CBException,
                  java.rmi.RemoteException
        disconnects from a ConceptBase server.
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs when disconnecting
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • tell

        CBanswer tell​(java.lang.String sFrames)
       throws CBException,
              java.rmi.RemoteException
        tells frames to the server.
        Parameters:
        sFrames - the frames
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • tellTransactions

        CBanswer tellTransactions​(java.lang.String sTransactions)
                   throws CBException,
                          java.rmi.RemoteException
        tells transactions to the server.
        Parameters:
        sTransactions - the frames
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • untell

        CBanswer untell​(java.lang.String sFrames)
         throws CBException,
                java.rmi.RemoteException
        untells frames to the server
        Parameters:
        sFrames - the frames
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • tellModel

        CBanswer tellModel​(java.lang.String[] asFiles)
            throws CBException,
                   java.rmi.RemoteException
        tells sml-files (text files containing frames) to the server
        Parameters:
        asFiles - an array of filenames
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • retell

        CBanswer retell​(java.lang.String sUntellFrames,
                java.lang.String sTellFrames)
         throws CBException,
                java.rmi.RemoteException
        untells specified frames and tells new frames to the server in one transaction
        Parameters:
        sUntellFrames - frames to untell
        sTellFrames - frames to tell
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException
        See Also:
        tell(String), untell(String)

      • ask

        CBanswer ask​(java.lang.String sQuery,
             java.lang.String sQueryFormat,
             java.lang.String sAnswerRep,
             java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
      throws CBException,
             java.rmi.RemoteException
        sends a query to the ConceptBase server.
        Parameters:
        sQuery - the query
        sQueryFormat - the format of the query (FRAMES or OBJNAMES)
        sAnswerRep - the format of the answer (e.g. FRAME, LABEL,...)
        sRollbackTime - Rollback Time (e.g.\ "Now")
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • askFrames

        CBanswer askFrames​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                   java.lang.String sAnswerRep,
                   java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
            throws CBException,
                   java.rmi.RemoteException
        sends a query in frame format to the server and returns the answer of the ConceptBase server
        Parameters:
        sQuery - the query
        sAnswerRep - the format of the answer (e.g. FRAME, LABEL,...)
        sRollbackTime - Rollback Time (e.g.\ "Now")
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • askObjNames

        CBanswer askObjNames​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                     java.lang.String sAnswerRep,
                     java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
              throws CBException,
                     java.rmi.RemoteException
        sends a query (as objectname) to the server and returns the answer of the server
        Parameters:
        sQuery - the query
        sAnswerRep - the format of the answer (e.g. FRAME, LABEL,...)
        sRollbackTime - Rollback Time (e.g.\ "Now")
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • hypoAsk

        CBanswer hypoAsk​(java.lang.String sFrames,
                 java.lang.String sQuery,
                 java.lang.String sQueryFormat,
                 java.lang.String sAnswerRep,
                 java.lang.String sRollbackTime)
          throws CBException,
                 java.rmi.RemoteException
        tells the specified frames temporarily to the ConceptBase Server, and evaluate the query on the temporarily object base.
        Parameters:
        sFrames - the frames
        sQuery - the query
        sQueryFormat - the format of the query (FRAMES or OBJNAMES)
        sAnswerRep - the format of the answer (e.g. FRAME, LABEL,...)
        sRollbackTime - Rollback Time (e.g.\ "Now")
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getObject

        java.lang.String getObject​(java.lang.String sObjname)
                    throws CBException,
                           java.rmi.RemoteException
        Calls the builtin query get_object with the given parameter
        Parameters:
        sObjname - the parameter for the query
        Returns:
        a string containing the frame for the object, or "error" otherwise
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • findInstances

        java.lang.String findInstances​(java.lang.String sObjname)
                        throws CBException,
                               java.rmi.RemoteException
        Calls the builtin query find_instances with the given parameter
        Parameters:
        sObjname - the parameter for the query
        Returns:
        a string containing a comma-separated list of object names, or "error" otherwise
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • stopServer

        CBanswer stopServer​()
             throws CBException,
                    java.rmi.RemoteException
        Stops the ConceptBase server
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • LPIcall

        CBanswer LPIcall​(java.lang.String lpicall)
          throws CBException,
                 java.rmi.RemoteException
        Performs an LPI-Call at the server. With LPI (Logic Programming Interface) one can call ProLog predicates defined in an LPI-Module.
        Parameters:
        lpicall - the predicate to be called
        Returns:
        the result of the method
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • nextMessage

        CBanswer nextMessage​(java.lang.String sType)
              throws CBException,
                     java.rmi.RemoteException
        Gets a message from the server
        Parameters:
        sType - the type of the message to be retrieved
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object containing the result and the completion
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getErrorMessages

        java.lang.String getErrorMessages​()
                           throws CBException,
                                  java.rmi.RemoteException
        Gets the error messages from the server for the previous method.
        Returns:
        a string containing all error messages
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • isConnected

        boolean isConnected​()
             throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        is a connection to a ConceptBase server established?
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • setConnected

        void setConnected​(boolean connected)
           throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        setter for the connected property. Supposed to be called only by CBClient
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getHostName

        java.lang.String getHostName​()
                      throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the hostname of the current server
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getPort

        int getPort​()
     throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the portno of the current server
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getUserName

        java.lang.String getUserName​()
                      throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the user name
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getToolName

        java.lang.String getToolName​()
                      throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the tool name
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getServerId

        java.lang.String getServerId​()
                      throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the ID of the server. This ID is also used in the CBanswer objects returned by the methods tell, untell, etc.
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getClientId

        java.lang.String getClientId​()
                      throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the ID of this client. This ID has been assigned by the server to the client when the client has connected to the server. It can be used to send a message to another client.
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • setTimeOut

        boolean setTimeOut​(int iMilliSecs)
            throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        sets the timeout for the connection
        Parameters:
        iMilliSecs - timeout in milli seconds
        Returns:
        success?
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getTimeOut

        int getTimeOut​()
        throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the timeout for the connection
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • setModule

        CBanswer setModule​(java.lang.String sModule)
            throws CBException,
                   java.rmi.RemoteException
        sets the module context of the current client.
        Parameters:
        sModule - the new module
        Returns:
        CBanswer object with completion CBanswer. * ok if the call was successful
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while processing this method
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getModule

        java.lang.String getModule​()
                    throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the current module context
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • getModulePath

        CBanswer getModulePath​()
                throws java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the current module path
        Throws:
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • listModule

        java.lang.String listModule​(java.lang.String sModule)
                     throws CBException,
                            java.rmi.RemoteException
        Returns:
        the module source
        Throws:
        CBException
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • notificationRequest

        CBanswer notificationRequest​(java.lang.String sAbout)
                      throws CBException,
                             java.rmi.RemoteException
        send a request for notification messages of the specified type.
        Parameters:
        sAbout - the type of the notification request, e.g. view(MyView)
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object with completion OK, if the request is accepted and an initial value as result (depends on the the type of the request)
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs when proccessing this request
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • notificationRequest

        CBanswer notificationRequest​(java.lang.String sAbout,
                             java.lang.String sTool)
                      throws CBException,
                             java.rmi.RemoteException
        sends a request for notification messages of the specified type for a given tool.
        Parameters:
        sAbout - the type of the notification request, e.g. view(MyView)
        sTool - the tool identifier (returned by getClientId()) of the tool which should receive the messages
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object with completion OK, if the request is accepted and an initial value as result (depends on the the type of the request)
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs when proccessing this request
        java.rmi.RemoteException
        See Also:
        CBclient.getClientId()

      • getNotificationMessage

        CBanswer getNotificationMessage​(int iTimeOut)
                         throws CBException,
                                java.rmi.RemoteException
        gets a notification message from the server
        Parameters:
        iTimeOut - the time to wait for a message in milli seconds
        Returns:
        a CBanswer object with the notification message, or null if no message was available.
        Throws:
        CBException - if an error occurs while reading the message
        java.rmi.RemoteException

      • connect

        java.lang.String connect​(java.lang.String sHost,
                         int iPort,
                         java.lang.String sTool,
                         java.lang.String sUser)
        connects to a ConceptBase server
        Parameters:
        sHost - hostname of the machine where the server runs
        iPort - port number of server
        sTool - the name of the tool
        sUser - the name of the user
        Returns:
        "yes" if successful, "no" else

      • disconnect

        java.lang.String disconnect​()
        disconnects from a ConceptBase server
        Returns:
        "yes" if successful, "no" else

      • pwd

        java.lang.String pwd​()
        display the current module path as a String like "System-oHome-myMod"
        Returns:
        module path string if successful, "no" else

      • cd

        java.lang.String cd​(java.lang.String newModule)
        switch the current module to a new module
        Parameters:
        newModule - the name of the module to switch to
        Returns:
        "yes" if successful, "no" else

      • mkdir

        java.lang.String mkdir​(java.lang.String newModule)
        create a new sub-module in the current module
        Parameters:
        newModule - the name of the module to be created
        Returns:
        "yes" if successful, "no" else

      • untells

        java.lang.String untells​(java.lang.String sFrames)
        untell the frames to the ConceptBase server
        Parameters:
        sFrames - frames to be removed
        Returns:
        "yes" if successful, user-readable error message else

      • tells

        java.lang.String tells​(java.lang.String sFrames)
        tell the frames to the ConceptBase server
        Parameters:
        sFrames - frames to be defined
        Returns:
        "yes" if successful, user-readable error message else

      • asks

        java.lang.String asks​(java.lang.String sQuery)
        ask the query to the ConceptBase server
        Parameters:
        sQuery - query call to be asked
        Returns:
        answer to the query if successful, "no" else

      • asks

        java.lang.String asks​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                      java.lang.String sFormat)
        ask the query to the ConceptBase server using a given answer format
        Parameters:
        sQuery - query call to be asked
        sFormat - the answer format to be used
        Returns:
        answer to the query if successful, "no" else
